/bin/c++ -fPIC -fvisibility=hidden -shared -Wl,-soname,libandroid-tree-sitter.so -o libandroid-tree-sitter.so CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/root/android-tree-sitter/tree-sitter-lib/lib/src/lib.c.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_cursor.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_language.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_lookahead_iterator.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_node.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_query.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_query_cursor.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/ts_tree.cc.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utf16str/JavaUTF16String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utf16str/JavaUTF16StringFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utf16str/UTF16String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utils/jni_string.cpp.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utils/ts_exceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utils/ts_preconditions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/android-tree-sitter.dir/utils/ts_obj_utils.cpp.o
